name: AfdxGetSignalString
title: AfdxGetSignalString
syntax: long AfdxGetSignalString( long packet, char signalName[], long bufSize, char buffer[] ); // form 1
description: This function copies up to bufSize characters of an AFDX string to the specified buffer. The AFDX string structure consists of a 16-bit length code n and a sequence of n ASCII characters.
return:
number of copied data bytes.
If this value is > bufSize an error occurred.

description: Analyze signals from an incoming AFDX packet using DBC information
